lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਸਚੀ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੀ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਚਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa sachee sach ratee tan man sachaa hoe |
lines.english: True is the tongue which is imbued with Truth, and true are the mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਹੋਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਜਾਸਹਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਭੁ ਖੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin saache hor saalaahanaa jaaseh janam sabh khoe |2|
lines.english: By praising any other than the True Lord, one's whole life is wasted. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖੇਤੀ ਸਚੁ ਬੀਜਣਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach khetee sach beejanaa saachaa vaapaaraa |
lines.english: Let Truth be the farm, Truth the seed, and Truth the merchandise you trade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin laahaa sach naam dhan bhagat bhare bhanddaaraa |3|
lines.english: Night and day, you shall earn the profit of the Lord's Name; you shall have the treasure overflowing with the wealth of devotional worship. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਹਲੀ ਪਾਏ ਥਾਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis no bakhase tis milai mahalee paae thaau |4|
lines.english: One who is so blessed by the Lord, obtains a seat in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਪੈਨਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਟੇਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach khaanaa sach painanaa sach ttek har naau |
lines.english: Let Truth be your food, and let Truth be your clothes; let your True Support be the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹਿ ਸਚੇ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੂਨੀ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aaveh sache jaaveh sache fir joonee mool na paeh |
lines.english: In Truth we come, and in Truth we go, and then, we are not consigned to reincarnation again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰ ਹਹਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh dar saachai sachiaar heh saache maeh samaeh |5|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are hailed as True in the True Court; they merge in the True Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰੁ ਸਚਾ ਮਨੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੀ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar sachaa man sachaa sachee sifat sanaae |
lines.english: Deep within they are True, and their minds are True; they sing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਥਾਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sachai thaan sach saalaahanaa satigur balihaarai jaau |6|
lines.english: In the true place, they praise the True Lord; I am a sacrifice to the True Guru. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵੇਖਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਸਚਾ ਸਭੁ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sach vekhanaa sach bolanaa sachaa sabh aakaar |7|
lines.english: Then, he sees Truth, and speaks the Truth; he realizes the True Lord pervading the entire Universe. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵੇਲਾ ਮੂਰਤੁ ਸਚੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach velaa moorat sach jit sache naal piaar |
lines.english: True is the time, and true is the moment, when one falls in love with the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਖਸੀ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau rakhasee aape kare rajaae |8|1|
lines.english: As it pleases Him, He preserves us; He Himself ordains His Will. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੈ ਮੇਲੇ ਤਾ ਮਿਲੇ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sachai mele taa mile aape le milaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, one merges with the True Lord, when He merges with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਵਿਆਪਿ ਰਹੀ ਅਧਿਕਾਈ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਨਿਤ ਸੰਤਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eindree viaap rahee adhikaaee kaam krodh nit santaavai |1|
lines.english: The sensory organs are totally engrossed in sensuality; sexual desire and anger constantly afflict him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੂਆ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਧਾਵਦਾ ਓਹੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: manooaa deh dis dhaavadaa ohu kaise har gun gaavai |
lines.english: His mind wanders in the ten directions - how can he sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਸਹਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: vaahu vaahu sahaje gun raveejai |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! Hail! Hail! Chant His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਦੁਲਭੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam is jug meh dulabh hai guramat har ras peejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is so difficult to obtain in this age; under Guru's Instruction, drink in the subtle essence of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਚੀਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabad cheen man niramal hovai taa har ke gun gaavai |
lines.english: Remembering the Word of the Shabad, the mind becomes immaculately pure, and then, one sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਤਾ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramatee aapai aap pachhaanai taa nij ghar vaasaa paavai |2|
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, one comes to understand his own self, and then, he comes to dwell in the home of his inner self. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har niramal sadaa sukhadaataa man chindiaa fal paau |3|
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord is forever the Giver of peace; from Him, one receives the fruits of his heart's desires. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: e man mere sadaa rang raate sadaa har ke gun gaau |
lines.english: O my mind, be imbued forever with the Lord's Love, and sing forever the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਨੀਚ ਸੇ ਊਤਮ ਭਏ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ham neech se aootam bhe har kee saranaaee |
lines.english: I am lowly, but I have been exalted, entering the Sanctuary of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਹੁ ਪਰਮਲ ਭਏ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਾਸਨਾ ਵਸਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: akahu paramal bhe antar vaasanaa vasaaee |5|
lines.english: From bitter herbs, I have been transformed into sandalwood; this fragrance permeates me deep within. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਸੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਭਏ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bikh se amrit bhe guramat budh paaee |
lines.english: From poison, I have been transformed into Ambrosial Nectar; under Guru's Instruction, I have obtained wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਥਰੁ ਡੁਬਦਾ ਕਾਢਿ ਲੀਆ ਸਾਚੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: paathar ddubadaa kaadt leea saachee vaddiaaee |4|
lines.english: He has lifted up the sinking stone; True is His glorious greatness. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag satigur milai har naam dhiaae |6|
lines.english: By perfect destiny, I met the True Guru, and I meditate on the Lord's Name. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮੁ ਦੁਲੰਭੁ ਹੈ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਖਟਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: maanas janam dulanbh hai jag meh khattiaa aae |
lines.english: This human birth is so precious; one must earn the right to come into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam sadaa sukh saagar saachaa sabad na bhaaeaa |7|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is forever an ocean of peace, but the manmukhs do not love the Word of the Shabad. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭੂਲੇ ਬਿਖੁ ਲਗੇ ਅਹਿਲਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bhoole bikh lage ahilaa janam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are deluded; attached to corruption, they waste away their lives in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਕਰੈ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mukhahu har har sabh ko karai viralai hiradai vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Everyone can chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har with their mouths, but only a few enshrine it within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸਿਆ ਮੋਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਤਿਨੑ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jin kai hiradai vasiaa mokh mukat tina paaeaa |8|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who enshrine the Lord within their hearts, attain liberation and emancipation. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਛੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 1 chhant |
lines.english: Wadahans, First Mehl, Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਸਾਚ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਾਚਾ ਤਾਮਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jab saach andar hoe saachaa taam saachaa paaeeai |
lines.english: When there is Truth within the heart, then one becomes True, and obtains the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੂੜਿ ਵਿਗਾੜਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਨਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa koorr vigaarr kaahe naaeeai |
lines.english: Why bother to wash the body, polluted by falsehood?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: naataa so paravaan sach kamaaeeai |
lines.english: One's cleansing bath is only approved, if he practices Truth.
